Description: Master adaptive music system for Jurassic survival game. Responds to emotional states and environmental conditions.

Inputs.Name: Play
Inputs.Description: Trigger to start the adaptive music system

Inputs.Name: Stop
Inputs.Description: Trigger to stop the music system

Inputs.Name: TensionLevel
Inputs.Description: Overall tension level from 0 (peaceful) to 1 (maximum threat)

Inputs.Name: ThreatProximity
Inputs.Description: Proximity to nearest threat (0=very close, 1=very far)

Inputs.Name: PlayerHeartRate
Inputs.Description: Simulated player stress level affecting rhythm and tempo

Outputs.Name: CurrentIntensity
Outputs.Description: Current music intensity for other systems to read

NodeGraph.Description: Adaptive music system with multiple layers that respond to game state

BaseLayer.Description: Fundamental ambient drone that's always present

HarmonyLayer.Description: Harmonic content that adds emotional color
Generators: Sine wave generators for pure tones

RhythmLayer.Description: Subtle rhythmic elements that emerge with tension

MelodyLayer.Description: Melodic content for wonder and discovery moments

ActivationConditions.Relief: When transitioning from Terror to Calm

SpatialProcessing.ReverbAmount: Increases in caves, decreases in open areas

DynamicProcessing.GateEffect: Creates silence gaps during Isolation state

FrequencyProcessing.EQ: Emphasizes different frequency ranges per environment

TransitionLogic.CrossfadeTime: Variable based on emotional state change severity
TransitionLogic.StateMemory: Remembers recent states to avoid rapid oscillation

PerformanceOptimizations.LODSystem: Reduces complexity when player is far from audio sources
PerformanceOptimizations.ConditionalProcessing: Disables unused layers to save CPU

DebugOutputs.LayerVolumes: Individual layer volume levels for debugging
DebugOutputs.ParameterValues: Current values of all input parameters
DebugOutputs.StateTransitions: Log of recent emotional state changes
